rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to the residual limitations period in Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §16.051, which governs filing deadlines for causes of action.
quote: Every action for which there is no express limitations period, except an action for the recovery of real property, must be brought not later than four years after the day the cause of action accrues.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns statute of limitations, unrelated to property tax exemptions.
